telegram.title: Trade on Telegram
telegram.subtitle: All the power, right in your pocket

t1.name: Alex M.
t1.text: PolyPulse signals are incredibly accurate. Made back my subscription in the first week.

t2.name: Sarah K.
t2.text: The Scalper Bot runs 24/7 and I just check profits. Game changer.

t3.name: Carlos R.
t3.text: Best Polymarket tool I've used. The Telegram integration is seamless.

q1.a: PolyPulse is a platform offering intelligent trading bots, signals, and alerts for Polymarket prediction markets. Our tools help you trade smarter, 24/7.

q2.a: No! Our bots handle the trading for you. The Free tier lets you learn with signals before committing. We also have tutorials on YouTube.

q3.a: Our bots connect to Polymarket via API, analyzing markets in real-time. They execute trades based on proven strategies — scalping, swing trading, or signal-based.

q4.a: Yes. We never hold your funds. Bots operate with your own wallet keys. Self-custody always.

q5.a: Absolutely. Cancel anytime with no penalties. We also offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

q6.a: Currently Polymarket. Kalshi and DraftKings Predictions support coming soon.

footer.risk: Trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
